summary: Inside Sales Rep Review feature testing complete. All 21 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified - My Queue tab with rep dropdown, summary cards, queue table, Approve/Flag actions all working. Triage tab with Assign functionality working. Tab navigation between all 5 tabs working correctly.
seed_data_creation: POST /api/sales-dashboard/seed-review-data creates 18 documents (15 assigned + 3 triage) with 3 reps
context_for_next_testing_agent: Inside Sales Rep Review feature fully tested. Backend endpoints: /api/sales-dashboard/reps, /my-queue, /triage-queue, /queue/{id}/approve, /queue/{id}/flag, /queue/{id}/assign, /seed-review-data all working. Frontend: My Queue tab at /sales-inventory?tab=my-queue with rep dropdown (data-testid=rep-selector), summary cards (data-testid=my-queue-summary), queue table (data-testid=my-queue-table). Triage tab at /sales-inventory?tab=triage with assign modal (data-testid=assign-modal). All 5 tabs navigable: my-queue, triage, sales, rep-performance, inventory.

verified: Returns reps array with rep_email, rep_name, source fields

Queue table with Review Status, Customer, PO/Ext Doc, File, Amount, Lines, Date, Info, Actions columns

Table with Status, Customer, PO/Ext Doc, File, Amount, Date, Actions columns
